name: Google Calendar
description: Time-management and scheduling calendar service developed by Google as part of Google Workspace.

years.notes: Material Design redesign rolled out with Android 5.0 Lollipop. Single-hue blue calendar page with a large white '31', two binding rings on top. Source viewBox 696.53x678.67 wrapped in a scale group; clip-paths, gradients and shadow overlays from the original were simplified out (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

Workspace four-color refresh unveiled on 6 October 2020 alongside the rename of G Suite to Google Workspace. White tile bearing the blue '31', framed by Google's four brand colors with three rounded corners and one diagonal cut at the bottom-right. Source viewBox 0 0 200 200 with internal +3.75 translate baked into a single matrix transform.
